name: dumb-waiter by a room
description: I'm in a dumb-waiter by a room
hints: You are in the dumb-waiter. It can be raised or lowered to reach different floors.
RAISE/OPEN DUMB to go up, LOWER/PUT DUMB to go down. GO ROOM to enter the adjacent room.
The dumb-waiter connects to the kitchen, workroom, and pantry. Use RAISE/LOWER to change floors, GO ROOM to exit.
RAISE (OPEN DUM) or LOWER (PUT DUM) to change floors. GO ROOM to exit at current floor: kitchen (room 12), workroom (room 21), or pantry (room 14).

effects: Message: There's something there, maybe I should
Message: I know how to RAISE and LOWER this thing!
Message: Sorry I can't do that
Message: Sorry I can't do that

notes: Dumb-waiter elevator connecting three floors: kitchen (room 12), workroom (room 21), and pantry (room 14). RAISE (OPEN DUM) to go up, LOWER (PUT DUM) to go down. GO ROOM to exit at current floor. Raising/lowering past limits can be fatal.
